title: populus × xiaohei var. gansuensis
intro: Populus × xiaohei var. gansuensis, also known as Gansu white poplar or Gansu poplar, is a hybrid species of poplar tree native to China. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Populus × xiaohei var. gansuensis include lowering fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating digestive issues, among others. In herbal preparations, the bark of the tree is often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a raw material for making medicinal powders and tablets.
